title: Custom Buttons in email/notifications to update board
excerpt:

posts.author: brantgraves (Brant Graves)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking to have the ability to use the gmail or notification function to be able to have buttons in the email that would be able to update the board.
IE, when I set an appointment to someone who is not in Monday, they have the ability to click a button in the email to confirm or reschedule the appointment. Then update the status column to the button they have pressed in the email.
Similar to Calendly or a google calender invite

posts.author: azaralady (Amanda M)
posts.cookedHtml:
+1 for this
I’d like to change the status of a task by having email recipients confirm they’ve done something by clicking on a button.

posts.author: Equinox (Hugues)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can add buttons in email but you need to use external app to send email. Monday sends a webhooks to Zapier. Zapier use an email marketing platform to send the email.

I have another issue. Webhooks model in Monday don’t let you the possibility to send a webhook when a date arrive (date column).
